input: user-microvideo interaction graph and multi-modal features (visual, acoustic, textual)
output: ranked list of micro-videos per user
backbone: graph contrastive learning network with collaborative and semantic views
loss: collaborative contrastive loss + semantic contrastive loss + cross-view contrastive loss
key_idea: enrich contrastive samples by leveraging structure-level similar nodes and multi-modal semantic graphs, with cross-view agreement maximization
